title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Swiggy family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
